---
title: "Lessons"
toc: false
page-navigation: false
sidebar:
  nav: false
---


## Course lessons

Use the sidebar to navigate, or choose a lesson below.


### Scenario Planning and Environmental Scanning



[5.3.1 AI Tools for Real-Time Environmental Scanning](module-1-lesson-01-ai-tools-for-real-time-environmental-scanning.qmd)  


[5.3.2 Trend Analysis in Higher Education using GenAI](module-1-lesson-02-trend-analysis-in-higher-education-using-genai.qmd)  


[5.3.3 Building Strategic Scenarios with AI Support](module-1-lesson-03-building-strategic-scenarios-with-ai-support.qmd)  


[5.3.4 Stress-Testing Institutional Plans with Simulations](module-1-lesson-04-stress-testing-institutional-plans-with-simulations.qmd)  


[5.3.5 Linking Strategic Foresight to Operational Strategy](module-1-lesson-05-linking-strategic-foresight-to-operational-strategy.qmd)  


[5.3.6 Key Takeaways](module-1-lesson-06-key-takeaways.qmd)  


[5.3.A Practical Use Cases](module-1-lesson-07-practical-use-cases.qmd)  


[5.3.B Learning Activities](module-1-lesson-08-learning-activities.qmd)  


[5.3.C Prompt Templates](module-1-lesson-09-prompt-templates.qmd)  


[5.3.D Innovative Use Cases](module-1-lesson-10-innovative-use-cases.qmd)  


[5.3.E Reflection & Discussion](module-1-lesson-11-reflection-discussion.qmd)  


[5.3.F Productivity Tips](module-1-lesson-12-productivity-tips.qmd)  


[5.3.G Prompt Library](module-1-lesson-13-prompt-library.qmd)  


[5.3.H Applying the AI Capability Framework](module-1-lesson-14-applying-the-ai-capability-framework.qmd)
